scripts.fix: pnpm exec ultracite fix && pnpm exec oxfmt --write .
scripts.precheck: pnpm exec ultracite check package.json turbo.json tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json opencode.json scripts
scripts.test:integration: mkdir -p .artifacts/test-results/integration && pnpm --filter @workspace/db build && pnpm --filter @workspace/email build && node scripts/local-postgres-launcher.mjs -- sh -lc 'pnpm --filter @workspace/db db:migrate && pnpm --dir apps/auth exec vitest run --reporter=default --reporter=junit --outputFile=../../.artifacts/test-results/integration/auth.junit.xml'
scripts.test:unit: mkdir -p .artifacts/test-results/unit && pnpm test:db-infra && pnpm test:opensrc && pnpm test:ui-propagation && pnpm --dir packages/db test && pnpm --dir packages/email exec vitest run --reporter=default --reporter=junit --outputFile=../../.artifacts/test-results/unit/email.junit.xml && pnpm --dir apps/api exec vitest run --globals src/app.test.ts --reporter=default --reporter=junit --outputFile=../../.artifacts/test-results/unit/api.junit.xml && pnpm --filter @workspace/ui build && pnpm --dir apps/web exec vitest run --reporter=default --reporter=junit --outputFile=../../.artifacts/test-results/unit/web.junit.xml
